info.english_meaning: to be awake to abandon sleep to be watchful

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tataH prajAgarAYcakrurvAnarAH' (Bawwi॰14.61) avekzAM cakrire praSabdaH pratyarTe avekzA pratijAgara iti kozaH
'upaSaye sTitirapi prajAgaro Bavati taTA ca BArate prayogaH- 'adya yudDe susaNkrudDo dIrGaM rAjYaH prajAgaram' (Salya॰27.21)
'agne tvaM su jAgfhi vayaM su mandizImahi' (vA0 saM0 414 tE0 saM0 61430) suzWu nidrArahito BavetyarTaH
'jyotiragrA uzasaH prati jAgarAsi' (aTarva0 14231) prati jAgarAsi jAgfhi anatyantasaMyogepi uzasa iti dvitIyAntam pratiyoge vA dvitIyA drazwavyA tadA pratiranupasargo Bavati
'udbuDyasvAgne pratijAgfhi' (vA0 saM0 1554) pratijAgfhi saMnikarze sanIqe jAgaritA Bava jAgrastfn
